steps.title: Convert pesos to US dollars using the exchange rate
steps.content:
Multiply 8,000 pesos by the conversion factor of 0.065 USD per peso:
$$8,000 \times 0.065 = 520.00 \text{ USD}$$

steps.title: Apply the 3% fee to the converted amount
steps.content:
Lina loses 3% to the exchange service, so she receives 97% of the converted dollars:
$$520.00 \times 0.97 = 504.40 \text{ USD}$$
A is correct.
